title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BONGATO WEST IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYAMBANG, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2914 / 57 OG No. 6, 1008 (February 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2774, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BONGATO WEST IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYAMBANG, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Bongato West is separated from the Barrio of Bongato, Municipality of Bayambang, Province of Pangasinan, and same is hereby constituted as a distinct and separate barrio of the said municipality.

SEC. 2. The remaining portion shall be known as Barrio Bongato East.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
